_description: Keyed cover-letter variants. Each key is a profile-chosen identifier (e.g. company_role_focus). Fields populate the template placeholders; unknown fields are ignored.

example_company_fintech_pm.openingParagraph: Your mission to make credit accessible lines up with work I have led shipping risk-scoring products for similar audiences.
example_company_fintech_pm.bodyParagraph: At Example Corp I drove a roadmap that grew ARR 7x in 18 months while cutting fraud losses by 34%. The wins came from a disciplined loop: weekly cohort reads, tight scope on experiments, and a bias toward shipping the smallest thing that would teach us something.
example_company_fintech_pm.closingParagraph: I would love to talk about where your product is heading next quarter and where I can help.
